name: boundlessinfo-steam-bot
description: Steam-login discovery bot for Boundless Info. Authenticates with the owner's own Steam + Boundless player account (no blessed API key), discovers live exoworlds + their world poll resources by probing world IDs against the universe discovery server, and POSTs the results to the Boundless Info ingest API. Faithfully ported from the MIT-licensed Boundlexx (Angellus) game client.
